creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Created attachment 252987
Patch to net/libarcus following protobuf update

I think the latest protobuf update breaks libarcus due to a inherited class needing more stuff to implement its abstract parent.

I haven't seen any upstream change to fix, so I just put some stubs to make the compiler happy and it builds and I can load  STL models and slice them.
